/usr/bin/c++  -O2 -march=native -fopenmp -O3 CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/Main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/Hypergraph.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/Utilities.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/ChipletPart.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/FMRefiner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/PriorityQueue.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/GeneticTechPartitioner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/floorplan.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/KLRefiner.cpp.o CMakeFiles/chipletPart.dir/src/CanonicalGA.cpp.o -o bin/chipletPart  lib/libcost_model.a lib/libpugixml.a lib/libmetis.a lib/libGKlib.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a lib/libConstructChip.a lib/libReadDesignFromFile.a lib/libDesign.a lib/libpugixml.a /usr/lib/gcc/x86_64-linux-gnu/13/libgomp.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpthread.a
